User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /private
Disallow: /temp

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://firesmart.io/sitemap.xml

# Crawl delay (in seconds) - be nice to servers
Crawl-delay: 1

# Block bad bots
User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Disallow: /
